name: bilenia-mobile-app
description: Bilenia native app shell (Capacitor) – paketerar React-build från bilenia-dealer-panel

scripts.sync:android:dev: NATIVE_BUILD_PROFILE=development bash scripts/apply-native-build-profile.sh && npx cap sync android
scripts.sync:android:prod: NATIVE_BUILD_PROFILE=production bash scripts/apply-native-build-profile.sh && NATIVE_BUILD_PROFILE=production npx cap sync android
scripts.build:android:dev: npm run build:web:dev && npm run sync:android:dev
scripts.build:android:prod: npm run build:web:prod && npm run sync:android:prod
scripts.sync:ios:dev: NATIVE_BUILD_PROFILE=development bash scripts/apply-native-build-profile.sh && npx cap sync ios
scripts.sync:ios:prod: NATIVE_BUILD_PROFILE=production bash scripts/apply-native-build-profile.sh && NATIVE_BUILD_PROFILE=production npx cap sync ios
scripts.build:ios:dev: npm run build:web:dev && npm run sync:ios:dev
scripts.build:ios:prod: npm run build:web:prod && npm run sync:ios:prod
